meta.title: The Key Role of EPC's in Industrial Cybersecurity
meta.description:
Samuel Linares of Booz Allen Hamilton's UAE office shows how the massive Engineering, Procurement, Construction (EPC) companies design and deploy critical infrastructure projects. The size of the cybersecurity budget and activities is minuscule, too small to be seen, but the potential impact to the project timeline and success is large.

Samuel goes through a real project with real numbers so you can see the size, length and complexity of the project. He also highlights when and how much cybersecurity was involved. As you might imagine, this is late and small.
